title: better invisible item frames
description: This mod adds invisible item frames that still let you interact with blocks behind them.
body:
This mod lets you make item frames invisible by sneaking and right‑clicking them. Unlike many other invisible item frame mods, you can still **interact with blocks through the invisible frames**: open chests, access barrels, use crafting stations and more.

[View source](https://codeberg.org/lland/Invis_item_frames)
[Report issues](https://codeberg.org/lland/Invis_item_frames/issues)
